# Implementation Report: Tests for withRnIconify and NativeIconifyModule

Generated: 2026-03-12

## Task

Write tests for two files with low/zero coverage:

- `src/metro/withRnIconify.ts` (0% -> 100%)
- `src/native/NativeIconifyModule.ts` (40% -> 100%)

## TDD Summary

### Tests Written

#### `src/__tests__/withRnIconify.test.ts` (12 tests)

- `calls createDevServerMiddleware with provided options` - verifies options forwarding
- `calls createDevServerMiddleware with undefined when no options provided` - verifies default behavior
- `preserves existing config properties` - non-server config fields are spread through
- `adds enhanceMiddleware to server config` - new server.enhanceMiddleware is added
- `preserves existing server config properties` - other server fields survive
- `uses metroMiddleware directly when no existing enhanceMiddleware` - no-enhance branch
- `applies existing enhanceMiddleware when present` - existing-enhance branch
- `routes /__rn_iconify_log to rn-iconify middleware` - log endpoint intercept
- `routes /__rn_iconify_status to rn-iconify middleware` - status endpoint intercept
- `passes non-iconify URLs through to enhanced middleware` - passthrough branch
- `passes URLs with similar prefixes through (not intercepted)` - exact-match only
- `routes iconify URLs even when existing enhanceMiddleware is present` - combined branch

#### `src/__tests__/NativeIconifyModule.test.ts` (8 tests)

- `getNativeIconifyModule returns the native module when available` - success path
- `getNativeIconifyModule returns null when not available` - null return path
- `getNativeIconifyModule returns null when get throws` - catch branch
- `getEnforcingNativeIconifyModule returns module when available` - success path
- `getEnforcingNativeIconifyModule throws when not available` - throw propagation
- `default export lazy getter calls getEnforcing` - lazy getter success
- `default export throws when module unavailable` - lazy getter throw
- `default export calls getEnforcing each time (not cached)` - getter re-invocation

### Implementation

No production code changes -- tests only.

## Test Results

- Total: 20 tests (12 + 8)
- Passed: 20
- Failed: 0

| ---------------------- | ----- | ------ | ----- | ----- |
| withRnIconify.ts       | 100%  | 100%   | 100%  | 100%  |
| NativeIconifyModule.ts | 100%  | 100%   | 100%  | 100%  |

## Full Suite Verification

- 25 test suites, 797 tests, all passing
- No regressions introduced

## Notes

- `withRnIconify` tests mock `createDevServerMiddleware` to isolate the config-wrapping logic
- `NativeIconifyModule` tests use top-level `jest.fn()` references for `TurboModuleRegistry.get/getEnforcing` to avoid stale reference issues with `jest.resetModules()`
- All branches covered: with/without existing enhanceMiddleware, iconify URLs vs passthrough, get success/null/throw, getEnforcing success/throw, default export lazy getter
